summary: Maeda has flipped bullish in his most recent video, explicitly calling a market bottom and predicting higher prices for Bitcoin.
narrative: After spending late 2025 successfully shorting Ethereum, his latest analysis from March 2026 argues that the market bottom is now in. He points to new leverage dynamics and contradicts 4-Year Cycle theories to support his thesis that Bitcoin is ready to move higher.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
